'''GashBears''' is a Taiwanese League of Legends team.

== History ==
'''Gash Bears''' was founded in December 2015, when [[Gamania Bears]] acquired three players of disbanded [[Logitech G Snipers]] and then renamed prior to playing in the [[LMS/2016 Season/Spring Promotion|LMS 2016 Spring Promotion Tournament]]. They lost 3-2 in the promotion stage to [[YoLMS]].
